profile.name: Abhishek Urs C J
profile.description: A Senior Software Engineer with over 4 years of experience specializing in high-performance JavaScript-based application development, custom embedded frameworks (Lightning JS), and scalable test automation architectures using Cypress.
profile.aboutText1: I am a dynamic and results-driven Software Engineer with over 4 years of experience specializing in JavaScript-based application development and automation frameworks. My expertise lies in building high-performance applications for embedded systems and set-top boxes, as well as designing scalable verification platforms from scratch.
profile.aboutText2: At Tata Elxsi, I have spent years bridging the gap between hardware limitations and software capability, using technologies like Lightning JS and WebSockets. I am passionate about engineering clean, maintainable code architectures and leading teams toward successful milestones.

list.summary: Architecting and engineering critical software solutions, building high-performance embedded TV/STB apps, and designing robust, automated testing frameworks from scratch.

achievements.title: Application Development (Lightning JS)
achievements.text: Architected and built a custom Certification App using Lightning JS designed for TV and set-top box platforms, ensuring high-performance execution.

achievements.title: System Integration (WebSockets)
achievements.text: Engineered logic for the application to receive and execute complex commands via WebSockets, successfully bridging the gap between test suites and platform hardware capabilities.

achievements.title: Framework Architecture (Cypress)
achievements.text: Designed a robust Cypress automation framework from the ground up to validate API support, system settings, and third-party application behaviors.

achievements.title: Technical Leadership & Mentorship
achievements.text: Developed custom glue code and modular JS commands, spearheaded peer code reviews to maintain code quality, and guided junior team members in framework design, effective script debugging, and clean coding practices.

achievements.title: "Extra Mile" Award
achievements.text: Received the prestigious "Extra Mile" award for delivering high-quality, maintainable code under tight deadlines and meeting critical project milestones.

list.title: STB Certification Application
list.description: An embedded application architected using Lightning JS designed for set-top box (STB) certification workflows. Connects to test controllers for executing validation suites.

list.title: Cypress E2E Automation Framework
list.description: A robust test automation platform designed from the ground up to validate API endpoints, system configuration settings, and third-party TV app behaviors.

list.title: Cloud Service Orchestration Engine
list.description: A cloud service orchestration platform designed to automate resource provisioning, coordinate multi-tenant APIs, and manage virtual network clusters.
